questions.text: Define Constitution. Why is it necessary for a country?
Differentiate between termination and deprivation of Indian citizenship.
How is State defined under Article 12 of Indian Constitution?
What is the basic difference between Fundamental Rights and Directive Principles of State Policy?
Explain the procedure for impeachment of the President.
Mention the powers and Functions of Attorney General of India.
Why do we need-to form separate Union Territories?
Distinguish between an ‘Ordinary Bill’ and ‘Money Bill’.
What are the constitutional provisions relating to freedom of trade, commerce and intercourse?
List out the three types of emergencies under Indian Constitution.
What is Preamble? Can it be used for the interpretation of the constitution? Also explain its significance.
Describe the salient features of Indian Constitution.
Give detail account on the historical background of Indian Constitution.
What is citizenship? Discuss the various methods of acquiring Indian citizenship.
Describe the Right to Constitutional Remedies and explain its significance.
Explain the needs and importance of fundamental duties of an Indian Citizen.
What are Fundamental Rights? Examine each of them.
State the Directive Principles of State Policy and explain its significance.
Explain the various jurisdictions of the Supreme Court of India.
Describe the constitutional duties and powers of the Prime Minister.
Discuss the functions and powers of the President of India.
Explain in detail about the Union Government structure and functions.
Explain the various writs issued by High court of Kerala.
Discuss the constitutional position and powers of Governor.
Explain the functions of the State Legislature.
Explain the responsibilities and functions of Council of Ministers to the State Legislative Assembly.
Describe the duties and role of Comptroller and Auditor General of India (CAG).
Examine the administrative and financial relations between the Union and the State.
Enumerate the powers and functions of Public Service Commission.
Explain the characteristics of Administrative Tribunals. What are the reasons for the growth of Administrative Tribunals in India?
